title: AnvilCraft: Qualia Addon
description: An addon for AnvilCraft, added something interesting.
body:
# AnvilCraft: Qualia Addon

An addon for AnvilCraft, added something interesting.

---

This addon added:
- Totem of Void, will protect your life when falling into the Void
- Void Amulet, will protect your life when falling into the Void
- And so on...
